sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101796" key="sxa/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σχάς</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], σχάδος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n101796.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἰσχάς</ref> </xr> (<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dried fig</tr_>), ib.</sense> </entryFree>
